tool_args.label: Advancing Black Excellence in the Workplace Panel Discussion

payload.event_name: Advancing Black Excellence in the Workplace
payload.description: B.E.G.I.N. held a panel discussion centered on Advancing Black Excellence in the Workplace Exploring Lessons Moving Forward. Several MTA executives from operations and headquarters took part.

tool_args.label: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk

payload.event_name: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk
payload.description: Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) led the MTA's participation. Goal was to raise $30,000 and raised over $40,000.
All Generational hosted their annual winter toy and coat drive to benefit The Henry Street Settlement. Collection boxes were available at all MTA Agencies.

payload.event_name: Veterans ERG Veteran Day Ceremony and Parade
payload.description: The Veteran ERG held their annual Veteran Day Ceremony. MTA Pipes and Drums, as well as The Color Guard, participated. Veterans took part in the NYC Veterans Day Parade.
Pride Express hosted a lunch and learn detailing the timeline of historical events that shaped the LGBTQ+ rights in the workplace.
Young Professional (YP) members had the opportunity to meet employees from different agencies and crafts; to introduce themselves describe their roles and responsibilities.
Advancing Black Excellence in the Workplace
